calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LOBEL FINANCIAL CORP.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION:

Debtor's motion to exempt all earnings from wage garnishment is GRANTED. Debtor states under penalty of perjury that her total monthly income is $144 and creditor provides nothing to the contrary.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
